narrative:
Sugarcreek Township has 2,406 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.6 percentage points.
